name: 3-octylthiophene
evidence: classic P3AT electropolymerization scaffold extending in-library 3-hexylthiophene
blocker: needs human source and coupling-site check
recommendation: Wave-A monomer promote after review.

name: 3,4-dimethoxythiophene
evidence: 3 and 4 dialkoxy donor keeps both alpha positions free and has electropolymerized film evidence
blocker: already appears as Eox benchmark but not live monomer library
recommendation: Promote as direct PEDOT-analog expansion candidate.

name: hydroxymethyl-EDOT
evidence: hydroxymethyl bridge handle improves aqueous PEDOT-OH formulation relevance
blocker: hydroxyl side chain may alter solubility and H-bonding
recommendation: Promote after source and neutral-state modeling check.

name: ProDOT-Me2
evidence: Reynolds-group PProDOT-Me2 electrochromic benchmark with free alpha positions
blocker: needs exact Eox and polymerizability source row for validation
recommendation: High-priority ProDOT family Wave-A monomer.

name: BiEDOT
evidence: dimeric EDOT lowers oxidation potential and retains terminal alpha coupling handles
blocker: larger molecule raises conformer and solubility considerations
recommendation: Promote only with exact coupling and solubility caveats.

name: EDOT-thiophene-EDOT
evidence: reported low-potential electropolymerizable ETE scaffold for OMIEC-like films
blocker: oligomeric candidate should remain separate from monomer Eox calibration rows
recommendation: Promote as library expansion candidate not as calibration shortcut.

name: ProDOS
evidence: selenophene analogue of ProDOT with electropolymerized low-bandgap PProDOS evidence
blocker: selenium geometry and source exactness need human check
recommendation: Good heavy-chalcogen Wave-A candidate.

name: ProDOP
evidence: PXDOP family has mild anodic electrodeposition and complements in-library EDOP
blocker: exact validation labels should be source-checked
recommendation: Promote after polymerizability source check.

name: 9,9-dibutylfluorene
evidence: solubilized fluorene homolog bridges current dimethyl and dioctyl fluorene seeds
blocker: direct electropolymerization evidence should be source-checked
recommendation: Promote if exact 2 and 7 coupling is verified.

name: 2,7-di(2-thienyl)-9,9-dimethylfluorene
evidence: flanking thiophenes provide clean outer-alpha electropolymerization handles
blocker: larger fused donor requires solubility and geometry check
recommendation: High-priority fluorene/fused donor candidate.

name: N-hexyl-DTP
evidence: N-alkylated DTP adds processability and preserves 2 and 6 thiophene coupling handles
blocker: exact Eox and source locator needed before benchmark use
recommendation: Promote as DTP-family expansion candidate.

name: TBT
evidence: bis-thiophene BTD unit has free outer alpha handles and low-gap electropolymer evidence
blocker: D-A rows need extra check to avoid film-HOMO values masquerading as monomer Eox
recommendation: Promote as library candidate only after validation source check.

name: acetone
evidence: native xTB ALPB and built-in SMD with obtainable measured ESW
blocker: conditioned ESW row must be pinned before production wiring
recommendation: Best Wave-A solvent candidate.

name: chloroform
evidence: native xTB ALPB and built-in SMD but low dielectric and shallow cathodic limit
blocker: needs Ag/AgCl-pinned ESW and ion-pairing caveat
recommendation: Do not wire before measured-window review.

name: 1,4-dioxane
evidence: native xTB ALPB and built-in SMD with co-solvent utility
blocker: very low dielectric and no pinned neat ESW
recommendation: Keep as lower-priority Wave-A reserve.

name: ethyl acetate
evidence: native xTB ALPB and built-in SMD spelling EthylEthanoate
blocker: low dielectric and modest ESW need source pinning
recommendation: Reserve until a conditioned ESW row is curated.

name: TEABF4
evidence: standard supporting electrolyte with strong MeCN and PC solubility and conductivity
blocker: confirm non-duplicate role and dry BF4 hydrolysis caveat
recommendation: Best Wave-A salt candidate.

name: TEAOTf
evidence: hydrolytically robust mobile supporting salt in polar aprotics
blocker: conductivity lower than PF6 or TFSI due ion pairing
recommendation: Promote as OTf cation-size complement.

name: TEATFSI
evidence: highly dissociated TFSI salt complements existing TBA and Li TFSI rows
blocker: validate salt solubility by solvent before wiring
recommendation: Promote as clean TFSI supporting electrolyte.

name: TPAPF6
evidence: intermediate cation size between TEA and TBA with PF6 dopant role
blocker: PF6 moisture/HF caveat applies
recommendation: Promote if cation-size coverage is desired.

name: THAPF6
evidence: bulky hydrophobic cation improves low-polarity solvent compatibility
blocker: larger cation lowers conductivity and needs DCM solubility check
recommendation: Promote only with salt-solubility caveat.

name: TEAClO4
evidence: classic MeCN supporting salt with ClO4 dopant role
blocker: perchlorate oxidizer hazard and existing ClO4 coverage reduce urgency
recommendation: Park unless exact ClO4 validation need outweighs safety caveat.
